initAPIKey.errorMessage: Please enter a valid API key.

login.title: Agent Hub
login.welcome: Welcome back to Agent Hub. Enter your credentials to access your dashboard.
login.error: Login failed. Please check your credentials and try again.
login.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email address below and we'll send you new password.
login.emailSentFailed: Failed to send password reset link.

settings.title: Account & Preferences
settings.themeDescription: Adjust the workspace appearance to reduce eye strain or match your lighting environment.
settings.clearHistoryConfirmation: Are you sure you want to clear all chat history? This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountConfirmation: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? All data will be removed forever.
settings.invalidPhone: Phone number must start with 0 and contain 10 to 11 digits
settings.apiKeyDescription: Enter your Groq API key to enable AI features. This key is required for authentication and secure communication with the AI services.
settings.passwordDescription: Secure your account with a strong password. Ensure it is at least 6 characters long
settings.deleteChatDescription: Deleting a conversation will permanently remove all messages and cannot be undone. Please confirm before proceeding.
settings.deleteAccountDescription: Deleting your account will permanently remove all your data, including conversations and personal information. This action cannot be undone. Please confirm before proceeding.
settings.logoutDescription: Logging out will end your current session. You will need to log in again to access your account. Make sure to save any unsaved work before logging out.
